SQLLite.SQL: SELECT CEV.STD_EVENT_ID AS "EventId" ,CEV.PRE_REQ_EVENT1 AS "PreReqEventId1" ,CEV.PRE_REQ_EVENT2 AS "PreReqEventId2" ,CEV.PRE_REQ_EVENT3 AS "PreReqEventId3" ,CEV.CREATES_HEARING AS "CreateHearing" ,CEV.CO_EVENT_SUB_TYPE AS "EventSubType" FROM CO_EVENT_VALIDATIONS CEV WHERE CEV.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId}
